_meta.matrix: 15 / 20 — Tool atomicity rollback (one invalid tool → batch rolls back)
_meta.notes: Per ADR-011: if any tool in a model response fails Zod or precondition validation, the WHOLE batch is rolled back (no partial state leaks); a single tool_validation_failed event is emitted; orchestrator may re-prompt once. Test injects a model response with [valid_pass_time, invalid_remove_inventory_unheld]; asserts: pass_time event is NOT in the log, tool_validation_failed IS, projection.form.state.ticks unchanged.
